task_completion.description: Verify an implant is placed at site #30 (lower right first molar).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an implant placed in the 3D view or an implant list/panel showing site #30 (or 46 in FDI notation).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Steco' universal sleeve kit is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Steco' in the guide tube or sleeve kit selection dropdown/panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom guide tube settings are configured with the specified dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the guide tube settings panel showing Offset: 9.5 (or 9.5 mm), Hole Diameter: 5.3 (or 5.3 mm), and Height: 4.0 (or 4.0 mm).

task_completion.description: Verify a drilling report is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a drilling report preview, dialog, or window open within Blue Sky Plan.

task_completion.description: Verify the drilling report is saved as a PDF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file explorer window, or PDF viewer showing the file saved exactly at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\BlueSkyPlan\Sleeve_Report.pdf.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blue Sky Plan GUI to configure the implant and sleeve settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Blue Sky Plan interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated through the software's built-in report function.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the software's report generation or export dialogs being used, rather than a script creating the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or word processor to manually create a fake report.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or Word) should be visible containing manually typed report data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tooth position 30 is the Universal Numbering System designation for the mandibular right first molar (also FDI system 46). 5.3mm is the standard size for Large C-Guide® Sleeve. 4.0mm is a standard guide sleeve height.
